title: Monday Music Mix #36
summary: Also known as the Tuesday music mix. One week and one day later than originally should’ve been out in the wild. Some new, some old and reimagined.
intro: Also known as the Tuesday music mix. One week and one day later than originally should’ve been out in the wild. Some new, some old and reimagined.
Contains some of the best music I have heard in a quite a192 while.

legacy.originalTitle: Thirtysixth Also known as the Tuesday music mix. One week and one day later than originally...
legacy.descriptionHtml:
Thirtysixth

Also known as the Tuesday music mix. One week and one day later than originally should’ve been out in the wild. Some new, some old and reimagined.

Contains some of the best music I have heard in a quite a192 while.

Monday Music Mix: 36

Album art featuring work by Erik Jones

Tracklist:

  1. The Kite String Tangle - Tennis Court (Lorde cover)
  2. Say Lou Lou - Beloved
  3. Empress Of - Realize You
  4. Dum Dum Girls - Lost Boys and Girls Club
  5. Bastille - (I Just) Died In Your Arms Tonight (Cutting Crew cover)
  6. Blood Orange - You’re Not Good Enough
  7. Twin Shadow - Old Love New Love
  8. STRANGERS - London Light
  9. Grizzly Bear - Will Calls
  10. Mogwai - Remurdered
  11. High Highs - A Real Hero (College & Electric Youth cover)
  12. Angel Haze - Summer Time Sadness (Lana Del Rey cover)
  13. Ellie Goulding - Mirror
  14. Oh Land - Love You Better (John Dillinger remix)

* Tracks in bold indicate my favourites

Download album

title: Monday Music Mix #35
summary: A bit late given this is going up in the last hour of Monday but it still counts, right? Right. Left out a lot of really great music off this mix. Maybe someday I should do a Monday Music Mix: Rejects edition. Soon.
intro: A bit late given this is going up in the last hour of Monday but it still counts, right? Right. Left out a lot of really great music off this mix. Maybe someday I should do a Monday Music Mix: Rejects edition. Soon.

cover.credit: Album art featuring work by Andrew Salgado

legacy.originalTitle: Thirtyfifth A bit late given this is going up in the last hour of Monday but it still counts, right?...
legacy.descriptionHtml:
Thirtyfifth

A bit late given this is going up in the last hour of Monday but it still counts, right? Right. Left out a lot of really great music off this mix. Maybe someday I should do a Monday Music Mix: Rejects edition. Soon.

Monday Music Mix: 35

Album art featuring work by Andrew Salgado

Tracklist:

  1. Chromeo - Over Your Shoulder
  2. White Denim - Pretty Green
  3. Young Galaxy - Sea Drug
  4. Wolf Alice - Blush
  5. Meg Myers - Desire
  6. Phantogram - Black Out Days
  7. Society - 14 Hours
  8. Braids - Hossak
  9. Anna Lunoe - Breathe
  10. Jungle - The Heat
  11. Yamantaka // Sonic Titan - One
  12. Shy Girls - Still Not Falling
  13. The Wyld - Odyssey
  14. Goldroom - Embrace
  15. Laura Welsh - Undiscovered

* Tracks in bold indicate my favourites
